title: Trustpilot Business Search Scraper
description: Search Trustpilot companies by keyword or browse businesses by Trustpilot category.

search_type.title: Search Type
search_type.description: Use company search for name/domain discovery, or category search for Trustpilot category browsing.

query.title: Company Query
query.description: Company, brand, or domain query for Trustpilot company search. Required when Search Type is Company search.

category.title: Category Slug
category.description: Trustpilot category slug, for example electronics_technology or restaurants_bars. Required when Search Type is Category businesses.

country.title: Country
country.description: Optional ISO-2 country filter, for example US, GB, DE, FR, or NL.

page.title: Start Page
page.description: First one-based Trustpilot result page to fetch.

max_pages.title: Maximum Pages
max_pages.description: Number of result pages to fetch, starting from Start Page.

min_rating.title: Minimum Rating
min_rating.description: Optional minimum TrustScore for company search.

min_review_count.title: Minimum Reviews
min_review_count.description: Optional minimum review count for company search.

claimed.title: Claimed Only
claimed.description: Filter category search results to claimed businesses.

trustscore.title: Category Minimum TrustScore
trustscore.description: Optional minimum TrustScore for category search.
